title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies:
Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
